name: Bandidos Motorcycle Club
description: The Bandidos Motorcycle Club is a motorcycle gang classified as a criminal organization by law enforcement in multiple countries. In Denmark, the club has ten chapters and about 150 members involved in drug dealing, extortion, fraud, weapons trafficking, and violent crimes. The Danish Bandidos originated from the Morticians club, which rebranded as Undertakers and patched over by Bandidos in 1993.
